family: apgr
notes: Cummins/Leblanc/Degnan/Nagle 2009 JEB 212:2037. Cloned multitransmembrane GPCR (286 aa, 6 TMs); in situ hybridization (Fig. 2) shows expression restricted to A. dactylomela rhinophore sensory epithelium. Partial CDS spanning TM2-TM7.

family: apgr
notes: Cummins/Leblanc/Degnan/Nagle 2009 JEB 212:2037. Cloned putative chemosensory receptor (246 aa, 5 TMs); in situ (Fig. 2) localizes transcript to rhinophore sensory cells. Partial CDS spanning TM3-TM7.

family: # --- Families flagged insufficient_curation (no functionally validated entries) ---
# schisto_chemo: All published deorphanized S. mansoni class-A GPCRs (Phan 2022,
#   Mader 2023) are neuropeptide/aminergic family members (orexin Smp_173010,
#   sulfakinin Smp_007070, NPF Smp_126730, serotonin Smp_180030, opsin Smp_203500,
#   allatostatin Smp_049330, FMRFa Smp_131980/140620, SmGPCR20) — these would be
#   filtered OUT by stage 06c as non-chemoreceptors and must not seed a
#   chemoreceptor HMM.
# annelid_chemo: Platynereis whole-head chemo recordings (Chartier 2018 Open Biol)
#   characterize organ-level chemoresponsiveness but identify no individual GPCR.
#   Capitella metamorphic transcriptomics (Burns 2017) lists upregulated transcript
#   classes without per-gene validation. Carbone 2025 (MBE) is comparative
#   genomics only.
# other_gastropod_chemo: Biomphalaria chemo is IRs not GPCRs (Mahapatra 2016).
#   Lymnaea FMRFa-R expansion (Vu 2024) is neuropeptide class. Ucciferri 2023
#   Lymnaea tentacle electrophys identifies no receptor.
